For orders as to maintainability of petition 17.10.2025 Mr. Salman Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Hunain Junejo, advocate for the respondent No.3 Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG Mr. S. Israr Hussain, Law Officer of respondent No.2 and Mr. Muhammad Sohail Imran, Legal Officer of respondent No.3 and Khadim Hussain Law Officer of SZABUL --------- Following the appointment of Vice Chancellor, Shaheed Zufliqar Ali Bhutto University of Law, Karachi, this petition has now become infructuous and is disposed of accordingly. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
